h2dd7ff32gd7f5g4912g9f24gc2a939d30325: So, we can bend minds like willow now? These worms are full of surprises.
haa1b260egfb8ag4ff6gb071gdefc8aff09c4: I wonder where the limit of their power lies. How much more can they do for us?
h0ceb209dga8bbg413cgabeag5627a4d22848: They could destroy us. We need to get rid of them, not risk using them.
h252f8bb5g0953g4d1eg9ba8g165e89c04d9f: Have you forgotten everything we've seen? Everything we've done? It's been one risk after another.
h2af1d2d2g1092g44d1g85bag084f56bd1ce6: But this is where you draw the line? The one thing that lets me walk in the sun?
h67ddfa5bg04a5g4591g8369ge998aba84d5f: But this is where you draw the line? The one advantage we've been given?
h7ead5d3ag934dg46f5g87c1g74db350eaba9: Let's be cautious. Power like this doesn't come free.
hb10d1465gd067g4a64g8060gef7d60d6ef82: No, but some prices are worth paying.
h0ec1b6d7gc731g4405gb714g1a03e092956c: First I can walk in the sun, then make people dance like puppets? I've certainly had worse days.
hd3ff1072gd4e2g43ddg8e06g689e26ccb694: No, they certainly have their benefits.
h2d5abff4gdd19g43ffgb092g4fead17d62be: They are ghaik parasites. They bring catastrophe, nothing more.
he6eff7e6g6092g4988ga985gc102b2fe8a99: We've been given a gift. You want to ignore that?
h8b65233bg7a1dg4539gb01bg22d50d2541c0: Mind flayers don't give gifts. This is a trap, trust me.
hecb3dc35g574dg46e2g9db5gddf3cb0ddbbe: This gift is a poison. Drink it if you wish.
heabf726ag498dg4605ga363g15001cf53711: Fine, live in your paranoid little bubble. I have my own worm, after all.
h55dea7e0g95dfg4cc3g8e52g3fec5e5a4d88: I don't know what we've been given. Best to be cautious.
h3120a9f0g614fg44d5g84beg06454afbb909: I want to be cautious. That is all.
h5b935c42ge20cg4086g953eg98886d8c9aa6: Caution is fine if you have time on your side. But we don't.
h2f18755fg2e55g4579g8482g5db52fb5e392: Given our situation, we might want to take the occasional risk.
h630695eagc7b3g45d4gb6a6g1a2e6ed2b866: I didn't say that. Might come in handy.
h9ccb730bg2640g48fag96acgbc9e36199af4: It may be useful. It may not. Time will tell.
h86eef34cga167g4c69gb12agb9c3d70aa75c: All I ask is you keep an open mind.
h23529a0cge5c2g405egb369gdfa3f37355ce: And you can take that as figuratively or literally as you like.
h54f68e48gdcd9g4571g976eg698af5a57a13: Mind flayers don't do shit for others. My people learned that long ago.
